creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #5)
> I am uncomfortable reassigning maintainership from a committer without his
> approval. John is part of portmgr; I'll leave it up to him to decide what
> the right thing is to do there.

Actually, I'm just a hyperactive regular guy.  I am a thorn in portmgr side. :)

acm@ has said a few times that he can't maintain all of his ports right now, and many have already been reverted.  This would have been one of those reversions had this PR not blocked the reset.

I'm pretty confident that acm@ will not mind giving the port to a good home.
